what_it_does: Defines a 24x24 SVG icon: a stroked circle containing a dollar-style mark drawn with path elements.
observations: The SVG uses viewBox="0 0 24 24" with explicit width and height of 24.
The icon is stroke-only, with fill="none" and stroke="currentColor".
Stroke styling uses width 1.5 with round line caps and joins.
A circle centered at 12,12 with radius 9 forms the enclosing outline.
Two paths draw the dollar mark: the central money glyph shape and its vertical stem segments.
standouts: Uses currentColor so the icon inherits text or parent color.
The dollar glyph is built from simple stroked path commands rather than text.
The circle and currency mark share the same stroke style.
conventions: Uses inline SVG primitives with presentation attributes on the root element.
Keeps geometry centered around the 12,12 midpoint.
concerns: No title, desc, role, or aria attributes are embedded, so accessible naming must be supplied by the caller when needed.
notes: A compact outline SVG for a circled dollar/currency icon.
questions: Should accessibility metadata be embedded here or handled by the consuming component?
purpose_vs_actual: The filename suggests a dollar-circle icon, and the file draws a circled dollar-style symbol.
intention_signals: It appears intended as a reusable UI icon for monetary, pricing, payment, or balance-related actions or labels.
contribution: Contributes a themeable stroke-based currency icon asset for finance-related UI affordances.
summary_for_embedding: A 24x24 currentColor outline SVG icon showing a dollar-style symbol inside a circular border.
intention_for_embedding: This file was for providing a reusable circled dollar icon that can inherit surrounding UI color.
